prompt: Show me the improvement chart for the agentic-os loop. Are the eval scores trending up?
Generate the progress report. I want to see how session-memory-manager is improving cycle by cycle.
Are we actually getting better? Show me the cycle of improvement across all the skills we've been testing.
Run the loop progress report and show me which survey friction items actually led to score improvements.
What's our autonomous completion rate trend? Graph it for me.
How are we doing overall? Show me the improvement data — eval scores, friction events, all of it.
How does the improvement tracking work? Explain the ledger to me.
What's the eval score for session-memory-manager right now?
Run the learning loop on the skill-improvement-eval skill.
Show me the test registry. What hypotheses have been confirmed?
The improvement ledger is empty, we haven't run any cycles yet. Can you still show me the chart?
Generate the progress report but only for the exploration-cycle-plugin, not agentic-os.
